title: tragacantha contortuplicata
intro: Tragacantha contortuplicata, also known as the needle grass or needle sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Tragacantha contortuplicata are said to include the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and the treatment of wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or poultices, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
